sql:
WITH seven_day_events AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT 
        EVENT_DATE,
        EVENT_TIMESTAMP,
        EVENT_VALUE_IN_USD
    FROM 
        GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201101
    WHERE 
        EVENT_DATE BETWEEN '20201101' AND '20201107'
        AND EVENT_VALUE_IN_USD > 0
),
two_day_events AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT 
        EVENT_DATE,
        EVENT_TIMESTAMP,
        EVENT_VALUE_IN_USD
    FROM 
        GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201101
    WHERE 
        EVENT_DATE BETWEEN '20201106' AND '20201107'
        AND EVENT_VALUE_IN_USD > 0
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT EVENT_TIMESTAMP) AS distinct_users
FROM seven_day_events
WHERE EVENT_TIMESTAMP NOT IN (
    SELECT EVENT_TIMESTAMP
    FROM two_day_events
);

WITH seven_day_events AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT 
        EVENT_DATE,
        EVENT_TIMESTAMP,
        EVENT_VALUE_IN_USD
    FROM 
        GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201101
    WHERE 
        EVENT_DATE BETWEEN '20201101' AND '20201107'
        AND EVENT_VALUE_IN_USD > 0
),
two_day_events AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT 
        EVENT_DATE,
        EVENT_TIMESTAMP,
        EVENT_VALUE_IN_USD
    FROM 
        GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201101
    WHERE 
        EVENT_DATE BETWEEN '20201106' AND '20201107'
        AND EVENT_VALUE_IN_USD > 0
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT EVENT_TIMESTAMP) AS distinct_users
FROM seven_day_events
WHERE EVENT_TIMESTAMP NOT IN (
    SELECT EVENT_TIMESTAMP
    FROM two_day_events
);

sql:
SELECT 
    p.product_id, 
    p.product_name, 
    SUM(t.quantity) AS total_quantity_sold
FROM 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160801 s
JOIN 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160802 s2 ON s.fullVisitorId = s2.fullVisitorId
JOIN 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160803 s3 ON s.fullVisitorId = s3.fullVisitorId
JOIN 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160804 s4 ON s.fullVisitorId = s4.fullVisitorId
JOIN 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160805 s5 ON s.fullVisitorId = s5.fullVisitorId
JOIN 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160806 s6 ON s.fullVisitorId = s6.fullVisitorId
LATERAL JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => s.hits) h ON TRUE
LATERAL JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => s2.hits) h2 ON TRUE
LATERAL JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => s3.hits) h3 ON TRUE
LATERAL JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => s4.hits) h4 ON TRUE
LATERAL JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => s5.hits) h5 ON TRUE
LATERAL JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => s6.hits) h6 ON TRUE
LATERAL JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => h.eCommerceAction) ea ON TRUE
LATERAL JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => h2.eCommerceAction) ea2 ON TRUE
LATERAL JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => h3.eCommerceAction) ea3 ON TRUE
LATERAL JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => h4.eCommerceAction) ea4 ON TRUE
LATERAL JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => h5.eCommerceAction) ea5 ON TRUE
LATERAL JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => h6.eCommerceAction) ea6 ON TRUE
JOIN 
    products p ON ea.productId = p.product_id AND ea2.productId = p.product_id AND ea3.productId = p.product_id AND ea4.productId = p.product_id AND ea5.productId = p.product_id AND ea6.productId = p.product_id
WHERE 
    (ea.action_type = 'purchase' OR ea2.action_type = 'purchase' OR ea3.action_type = 'purchase' OR ea4.action_type = 'purchase' OR ea5.action_type = 'purchase' OR ea6.action_type = 'purchase')
    AND (p.product_name != 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley')
GROUP BY 
    p.product_id, p.product_name
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity_sold DESC
LIMIT 1;

LATERAL JOIN

LATERAL JOIN

LATERAL JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => h.eCommerceAction) ea ON TRUE
LATERAL JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => h2.eCommerceAction) ea2 ON TRUE
LATERAL JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => h3.eCommerceAction) ea3 ON TRUE
LATERAL JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => h4.eCommerceAction) ea4 ON TRUE
LATERAL JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => h5.eCommerceAction) ea5 ON TRUE
LATERAL JOIN

JOIN 
    products p ON ea.productId = p.product_id AND ea2.productId = p.product_id AND ea3.productId = p.product_id AND ea4.productId = p.product_id AND ea5.productId = p.product_id AND ea6.productId = p.product_id
WHERE 
    (ea.action_type = 'purchase' OR ea2.action_type = 'purchase' OR ea3.action_type = 'purchase' OR ea4.action_type = 'purchase' OR ea5.action_type = 'purchase' OR ea6.action_type = 'purchase')
    AND (p.product_name != 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley')
GROUP BY 
    p.product_id, p.product_name
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity_sold DESC
LIMIT 1;

sql:
WITH MonthlyRevenue AS (
    SELECT 
        trafficSource.adwordsClickInfo.criteriaParameters AS ad_group,
        SUM(totals.transactionRevenue) AS monthly_revenue
    FROM 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_2017*
    WHERE 
        trafficSource.adwordsClickInfo.criteriaParameters IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 
        trafficSource.adwordsClickInfo.criteriaParameters
),
MaxMinRevenue AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(monthly_revenue) - MIN(monthly_revenue) AS revenue_difference
    FROM 
        MonthlyRevenue
)
SELECT 
    ad_group, 
    ROUND(revenue_difference, 2) AS revenue_difference_millions
FROM 
    MaxMinRevenue;

sql:
WITH FirstVisit AS (
    SELECT 
        fullVisitorId,
        MIN(visitStartTime) AS firstVisitTime
    FROM 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160801
    WHERE 
        date BETWEEN '20170201' AND '20170228'
    GROUP BY 
        fullVisitorId
),
FirstTransaction AS (
    SELECT 
        fullVisitorId,
        MIN(visitStartTime) AS firstTransactionTime,
        device:deviceCategory AS deviceType
    FROM 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160801
    WHERE 
        date BETWEEN '20170201' AND '20170228'
        AND totals.transactions > 0
    GROUP BY 
        fullVisitorId, device:deviceCategory
)
SELECT 
    fv.fullVisitorId,
    DATEDIFF(DAY, fv.firstVisitTime, ft.firstTransactionTime) AS daysElapsed,
    ft.deviceType
FROM 
    FirstVisit fv
JOIN 
    FirstTransaction ft ON fv.fullVisitorId = ft.fullVisitorId;

FROM

JOIN 
    FirstTransaction ft ON fv.fullVisitorId = ft.fullVisitorId;

sql:
WITH RevenueData AS (
    SELECT
        trafficSource.adwordsClickInfo.criteriaParameters AS ad_group,
        SUM(totals.pageviews) AS total_revenue,
        MAX(totals.pageviews) AS max_daily_revenue,
        MAX(SUM(totals.pageviews)) OVER (PARTITION BY DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD'))) AS max_weekly_revenue,
        MAX(SUM(totals.pageviews)) OVER (PARTITION BY DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD'))) AS max_monthly_revenue
    FROM
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160801
    WHERE
        TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN '2017-01-01' AND '2017-06-30'
    GROUP BY
        trafficSource.adwordsClickInfo.criteriaParameters
)
SELECT
    ad_group,
    total_revenue,
    max_daily_revenue,
    max_weekly_revenue,
    max_monthly_revenue
FROM
    RevenueData
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 1;
original_sql:

        trafficSource.adwordsClickInfo.criteriaParameters AS ad_group,
        SUM(totals.pageviews) AS total_revenue,
        MAX(totals.pageviews) AS max_daily_revenue,
        MAX(SUM(totals.pageviews)) OVER (PARTITION BY DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD'))) AS max_weekly_revenue,
        MAX(SUM(totals.pageviews)) OVER (PARTITION BY DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD'))) AS max_monthly_revenue
    FROM
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160801
    WHERE
        TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN '2017-01-01' AND '2017-06-30'
    GROUP BY
        trafficSource.adwordsClickInfo.criteriaParameters
)
SELECT
    ad_group,
    total_revenue,
    max_daily_revenue,
    max_weekly_revenue,
    max_monthly_revenue
FROM
    RevenueData
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 1;

sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(totals:transactions) >= 1 AND SUM(totals:productRevenue) IS NOT NULL THEN 'Purchase'
        ELSE 'Non-Purchase'
    END AS session_type,
    AVG(SUM(hits:pageviews)) OVER (PARTITION BY DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')), session_type) AS avg_pageviews_per_visitor
FROM 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170401
UNION ALL

    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(totals:transactions) >= 1 AND SUM(totals:productRevenue) IS NOT NULL THEN 'Purchase'
        ELSE 'Non-Purchase'

sql:
SELECT DISTINCT h.eCommerceAction.productDetails.productName AS productName, SUM(h.eCommerceAction.productDetails.quantity) AS totalQuantity
FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170701 h
JOIN LATERAL FLATTEN(input => h.hits) AS f
WHERE h.eCommerceAction.actionType = 'purchase'
AND h.eCommerceAction.productDetails.productName NOT LIKE '%YouTube%'
GROUP BY h.eCommerceAction.productDetails.productName
ORDER BY totalQuantity DESC
LIMIT 1;
original_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT h.eCommerceAction.productDetails.productName AS productName, SUM(h.eCommerceAction.productDetails.quantity) AS totalQuantity
FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170701 h
JOIN LATERAL FLATTEN(input => h.hits) AS f
WHERE h.eCommerceAction.actionType = 'purchase'
AND h.eCommerceAction.productDetails.productName NOT LIKE '%YouTube%'
GROUP BY h.eCommerceAction.productDetails.productName
ORDER BY totalQuantity DESC
LIMIT 1;

sql:
SELECT 
    h.exitScreenName AS nextPage,
    MAX(totals.timeOnSite) AS maxTimeOnHomePage
FROM 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201701 AS s
LATERAL JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => s.hits) AS h
JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => s.customDimensions) AS cd ON TRUE
WHERE 
    s.date BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20170131'
    AND cd.index = 4 AND cd.value LIKE '%Data Share%'
    AND h.pagePath LIKE '/home%'
GROUP BY 
    h.exitScreenName
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;
original_sql:
SELECT 
    h.exitScreenName AS nextPage,
    MAX(totals.timeOnSite) AS maxTimeOnHomePage
FROM 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201701 AS s
LATERAL JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => s.hits) AS h
JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => s.customDimensions) AS cd ON TRUE
WHERE 
    s.date BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20170131'
    AND cd.index = 4 AND cd.value LIKE '%Data Share%'
    AND h.pagePath LIKE '/home%'
GROUP BY 
    h.exitScreenName
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

sql:
WITH PurchaseSessions AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
        fullVisitorId,
        SUM(COALESCE(totals.pageviews, 0)) AS total_pageviews
    FROM 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201706
    WHERE 
        totals.transactions > 0
    GROUP BY 
        month, fullVisitorId
),
NonPurchaseSessions AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
        fullVisitorId,
        SUM(COALESCE(totals.pageviews, 0)) AS total_pageviews
    FROM 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201706
    WHERE 
        totals.transactions = 0
    GROUP BY 
        month, fullVisitorId
)
SELECT 
    p.month,
    AVG(p.total_pageviews) AS avg_purchase_pageviews,
    AVG(np.total_pageviews) AS avg_non_purchase_pageviews
FROM 
    PurchaseSessions p
FULL OUTER JOIN 
    NonPurchaseSessions np ON p.month = np.month AND p.fullVisitorId = np.fullVisitorId
GROUP BY 
    p.month;

WITH PurchaseSessions AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
        fullVisitorId,
        SUM(COALESCE(totals.pageviews, 0)) AS total_pageviews
    FROM 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201706
    WHERE 
        totals.transactions > 0
    GROUP BY 
        month, fullVisitorId
),
NonPurchaseSessions AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
        fullVisitorId,
        SUM(COALESCE(totals.pageviews, 0)) AS total_pageviews
    FROM 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201706
    WHERE 
        totals.transactions = 0
    GROUP BY 
        month, fullVisitorId
)
SELECT 
    p.month,
    AVG(p.total_pageviews) AS avg_purchase_pageviews,
    AVG(np.total_pageviews) AS avg_non_purchase_pageviews
FROM 
    PurchaseSessions p
FULL OUTER JOIN 
    NonPurchaseSessions np ON p.month = np.month AND p.fullVisitorId = np.fullVisitorId
GROUP BY 
    p.month;

sql:
WITH FirstVisit AS (
    SELECT 
        fullVisitorId, 
        MIN(visitStartTime) AS firstVisitTime
    FROM 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160801
    GROUP BY 
        fullVisitorId
),
LastEvent AS (
    SELECT 
        s.fullVisitorId, 
        MAX(s.visitStartTime) AS lastEventTime
    FROM 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160801 s
    JOIN 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160802 s2 ON s.fullVisitorId = s2.fullVisitorId
    WHERE 
        s.device:mobile IS TRUE OR s2.device:mobile IS TRUE
    GROUP BY 
        s.fullVisitorId
)
SELECT 
    fv.fullVisitorId, 
    DATEDIFF(DAY, fv.firstVisitTime, le.lastEventTime) AS daysBetweenFirstVisitAndLastEvent
FROM 
    FirstVisit fv
JOIN 
    LastEvent le ON fv.fullVisitorId = le.fullVisitorId;

WITH FirstVisit AS (
    SELECT 
        fullVisitorId, 
        MIN(visitStartTime) AS firstVisitTime
    FROM 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160801
    GROUP BY 
        fullVisitorId
),
LastEvent AS (
    SELECT 
        s.fullVisitorId, 
        MAX(s.visitStartTime) AS lastEventTime
    FROM 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160801 s
    JOIN 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160802 s2 ON s.fullVisitorId = s2.fullVisitorId
    WHERE 
        s.device:mobile IS TRUE OR s2.device:mobile IS TRUE
    GROUP BY 
        s.fullVisitorId
)
SELECT 
    fv.fullVisitorId, 
    DATEDIFF(DAY, fv.firstVisitTime, le.lastEventTime) AS daysBetweenFirstVisitAndLastEvent
FROM 
    FirstVisit fv
JOIN 
    LastEvent le ON fv.fullVisitorId = le.fullVisitorId;
